contentId.description: ID of content to purchase (video or playlist)

playlistId.description: If content is a video in a playlist

email.description: Email corresponds to the email field in MySQL table, type VARCHAR(255), cannot be null

password.description: Password corresponds to the plaintext password used for password verification in MySQL table, type VARCHAR(255), cannot be null

packageId.description: ID of the coin package or subscription package

cancelUrl.description: URL to redirect if payment is canceled

successUrl.description: URL to redirect after successful payment

episodeNumber.description: Episode number of the video in the playlist

freeVideos.description: Number of free videos before requiring payment

singleVideoPrice.description: Cost in coins to unlock a single video

vids.description: List of video IDs to add
List of video IDs to remove

playlistIds.description: SiteID	 string   `json:"siteId" binding:"required" example:"site-123"` // Site ID

freeVideos.description: Number of free videos before requiring payment

singleVideoPrice.description: Cost in coins to unlock a single video

email.description: email corresponds to the email field in MySQL table

Email is the user's email address
Required: true
Format: email

siteId.description:
SiteID is the unique identifier of the site
Required: true

status.description:
Status is the new status to assign to the user
Required: true
Enum: 2 3 127
2: activate - User is active
3: forbidden - User is forbidden
127: delete - User is deleted

vids.description: List of video IDs to delete

episodeNumber.description: 视频在播放列表中的集数

uploadStatus.description: Upload status: 1-Not uploaded, 2-Uploading, 3-Upload failed, 4-Upload canceled, 5-Upload successful

unlockStatus.description: Unlock status 1 - unlocked, 2 - locked  0 - not applicable

vids.description: List of successfully uploaded video IDs
